— 

COMMENT: This field is derived by multiplying the pass thru per diem amount that is present on the last claim record 
included in the stay times the MEDPAR utilization day count (the sum of the utilization [covered] days 
reported on the claims that comprise the stay). 

Items reimbursed as pass through include capital-related costs, direct medical education costs, kidney 
acquisition costs for hospitals approved as rtc's, and bad debts (per provider reimbursement manual, 
part 1, section
